x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They gather, process, and analyze customer data to identify trends and patterns.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Market Researchers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They conduct studies and surveys to understand customer preferences and motivations.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Customer Experience Managers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They focus on improving the overall customer journey and ensuring a positive experience.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Business Intelligence Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They use data visualization and reporting tools to provide actionable insights.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Marketing Strategists
x-enumeration-literals.description: They develop campaigns and strategies based on customer behavior data to drive engagement and sales.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Product Managers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They use customer insights to inform product development and enhancements.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Sales Analysts
x-enumeration-literals.description: They analyze sales data to understand customer purchasing behavior and improve sales strategies.

x-enumeration-literals.name: CRM Specialists
x-enumeration-literals.description: They manage customer relationship management systems to track and analyze customer interactions and data.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Data Scientists
x-enumeration-literals.description: They build models and algorithms to predict future customer behavior and trends.

x-enumeration-literals.name: UX/UI Designers
x-enumeration-literals.description: They use insights to design user-friendly interfaces and improve the user experience.
